program.turkana.title: Clean Water Initiative: Turkana
program.turkana.description: Providing sustainable, clean drinking water to drought-affected communities through solar-powered borewells.
program.challenge.title: The Challenge
program.challenge.description: In Turkana County, severe and prolonged droughts have decimated water sources. Women and children walk an average of 15 kilometers daily just to fetch water that is often contaminated.

aboutPage.hero.heading: We Are a Team of Change-Makers
aboutPage.hero.subtext: Driven by a belief that every helping hand can raise a child and create a better future.
aboutPage.story.title: Our Story & Commitment
aboutPage.story.paragraph1: We started by extending help to needy children and youth who were eager to study and work for a better life. This moment intensified when we found that there were many such underprivileged children who needed help with food, shelter, and education.
aboutPage.story.paragraph2: Our team expanded and spread out in different regions to make sure we cover all possible areas. We now run shelter homes, schools, and support systems that help such needy young people.
aboutPage.approach.title: Our approach
aboutPage.approach.missionText1: Our mission is to make sure all young people and children get the support they need, when they need it, no matter what it is.
aboutPage.approach.missionText2: Whether it is a reassuring conversation, financial help, education, professional training, or simply the assurance that they are not alone, we will make sure that everyone gets support that meets them where they're at as quickly as possible.
aboutPage.approach.visionText1: We want to build a world where no child or youth feels alone and gets every possible help they need as soon as possible.
aboutPage.approach.visionText2: Our entire team wants to see a world where every youngster struggling in any way feels able to reach out and has people who'll help them with education, jobs, and more.
aboutPage.partners.title: Our Partners
aboutPage.impact.title: Impact & Statistics
aboutPage.cta.heading: Be a Part of the Change
aboutPage.cta.subtext: Join our mission to create lasting impact.
workPage.hero.title: Our Work
workPage.hero.subtitle: We work in partnership with local communities to create lasting change. From emergency relief to long-term development, we address the root causes of poverty and inequality.
workPage.areas.title: Areas of Impact
workPage.areas.emergency.title: Emergency Response
workPage.areas.emergency.desc: We deliver food, water, shelter, and medical care within 72 hours of disasters — reaching 5M+ people annually.
workPage.areas.healthcare.title: Healthcare Access
workPage.areas.healthcare.desc: We build clinics, train community health workers, and provide vaccines to prevent disease and save lives.
workPage.areas.education.title: Education & Youth
workPage.areas.education.desc: We build schools, provide scholarships, and empower girls through education programs in 80+ countries.
workPage.regions.title: Where We Work
workPage.regions.subtitle: LAB Foundation operates in 121 countries, with a special focus on regions most affected by conflict, climate change, and systemic poverty. We go where the need is greatest.
workPage.regions.africa.title: Africa
workPage.regions.asia.title: Asia & Pacific
workPage.cta.title: Make a Difference Today
workPage.cta.subtitle: Your support funds critical programs that change lives — from building wells to training teachers to delivering medicine.

donate.hero.title: Your Gift Changes Lives
donate.hero.subtitle: 90% of every dollar you give goes directly to our lifesaving programs. With your support, we can reach more families, build stronger communities, and create lasting change.

volunteer.testimonials.title: Why We Volunteer
volunteer.testimonials.elena.quote: Volunteering with LAB gave me a sense of purpose. Seeing the impact in Turkana was life-changing.
volunteer.testimonials.elena.name: Elena Rodriguez
volunteer.testimonials.david.quote: I used my coding skills to help streamline their donation platform. It's amazing to see the result.
volunteer.testimonials.david.name: David Kim

partnerships.hero.title:
Partner for
Global Impact
partnerships.hero.subtitle: We believe in the power of collective action. By joining forces with corporations, foundations, and institutions, we scale our impact and create sustainable change.
partnerships.benefits.title: Why Partner With LAB?
partnerships.benefits.subtitle: Our partnerships are built on transparency, mutual value, and measurable results.
partnerships.benefits.items.impact.title: Measurable Impact
partnerships.benefits.items.impact.desc: We provide detailed impact reports and data analytics, ensuring you see exactly how your contribution changes lives.
partnerships.benefits.items.reach.title: Global Reach
partnerships.benefits.items.reach.desc: Leverage our network in 50+ countries to expand your organization's social footprint and brand visibility.
partnerships.benefits.items.execution.de: With over 15 years of experience, we have the operational expertise to execute complex projects efficiently.
partnerships.models.corporate.title: Corporate Partners
partnerships.models.corporate.desc: Align your brand with purpose. We offer tailored CSR programs, employee volunteering opportunities, and cause-marketing campaigns.
partnerships.models.ngo.title: NGOs & Foundations
partnerships.models.ngo.desc: We collaborate with fellow non-profits and grant-making foundations to tackle complex challenges. By sharing resources and expertise, we amplify our collective impact on the ground.
partnerships.marquee.title: Trusted By Industry Leaders
partnerships.cta_footer.title: Ready to Partner?
partnerships.cta_footer.desc: Let's discuss how we can work together to achieve your organization's social impact goals.
